description: Style NoteIf you want to look fasionable and stylish at this time of the year, sepia has just what you need. This dressy, girly and summery top is a must-have in your wardrobe. Pair this with fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, femine vibe.Product DetailsAquamarine blue sleeveless top with an open placket, tie ups at the outer and inner (kimono stye), has an assymmetrical hem and a fabric belt at the backMaterial and CareViscose blendRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery or printDry on reverse side under the sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
